name: Artichoke Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Break apart the artichoke hearts and layer them in the raw pie crust.
2. Place a layer of cheese slices on top of the artichokes.
3. Repeat layers with more artichoke hearts and cheese.
4. Beat eggs, add crushed tarragon, nutmeg, salt, melted butter, and flour.
5. Pour the beaten mixture over the layered filling in the pie crust.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 40 minutes until the top is browned.
7. Let the quiche rest for several minutes before cutting.
